rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RENNA HOLMES
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File An Amended Cross-Complaint; Or In The Alt, To Allow Already Filed Cross-Complaint To Stand
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, OCTOBER 30, 2007, LINE 1, DEFENDANTS TOSHIA WEBSTER AND TINA WEBSTER'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File An Amended Cross-Complaint; Or In The Alternative, To Allow Already Filed Cross-Complaint To Stand. IT APPEARS THAT THIS CASE AND A MOTION TO STRIKE THE CROSS-COMPLAINT ARE PENDING IN THE PROBATE DEPARTMENT. ACCORDINGLY, THIS MOTION IS CONTINUED TO THE PROBATE DEPARTMENT ON NOVEMBER 15, 2007 TO BE HEARD IN CONJUNCTION WITH THE MOTION TO STRIKE. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: MARSHA LEE-HARRISON VS. MILLS BUILDING THE SWIG COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion For Leave To Sever The X-Complaint And Stay Proceedings Against One Source Building Services,Inc.
rulings.Rulings: CROSS-DEFENDANT ONE SOURCE BUILDING SERVICES, INC.'S Motion For Leave To Sever The Cross-Complaint And Stay Proceedings Against One Source Building Services, Inc., HEARING REQUIRED. IT APPEARS THAT THE CLAIMS RAISED IN THE CROSS-COMPLAINTS SHOULD BE TRIED AT THE SAME TIME. HOWEVER, SERVICE ON ONE SERVICE ON THE EVE OF TRIAL WARRANTS A STAY OF THE CLAIMS AGAINST IT, OR SEVERANCE OF THE CROSS-COMPLAINTS OR A CONTINUATION OF THE CURRENT TRIAL DATE. =(302/PJM/AY)

rulings.Case Title: ATR-KIM ENG FINANCIAL CORPORATION VS. CARLOS ARANETA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn For Transfer & Consolidation Of Noncomplex Actions, Request For Judicial Ntc,
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, OCTOBER 30, 2007, LINE 6, PLAINTIFFS ATR-KIM ENG FINANCIAL CORPORATION AND ATR-KIM ENG CAPITAL PARTNERS, INC.'S Motion For Transfer & Consolidation Of Noncomplex Actions. CONSOLIDATION OF THE CASES IS WARRANTED UNDER CALIFORNIA RULE OF COURT 3.500. GIVEN THAT THE SAN FRANCISCO CASE IS FURTHER ALONG, CONSOLIDATION IN SAN FRANCISCO IS APPROPRIATE. IN SO RULING, IT IS NOT THE INTENTION OF THE COURT TO PRECLUDE THE SAN MATEO SUPERIOR COURT FROM RULING ON THE MOTIONS PENDING IN THAT COURT. =(302/PJM/SN-X)

rulings.Case Title: HERMAN LEDBETTER VS. BEREHANU H CHALLA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, OCTOBER 30, 2007, LINE 8, DEFENDANT BEREHANU CHALLA'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED AS TO SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FAILURE TO ALLEGE HOW PLAINTIFF HAS BEEN DAMAGED BY THE ALLEGED FRAUD. 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. OVERRULED AS TO FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF ALLEGES A DUTY TO EXERCISE REASONABLE CARE AND A BREACH THEREOF. PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES ARE A QUESTION OF FACT, NOT SUSCEPTIBLE TO DEMURRER AND NEITHER BUDD NOR HOLLOWAY SUPPORT THE GRANTING OF THE DEMURRER. 10 DAYS TO ANSWER IF PLAINTIFF CHOOSES NOT TO FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT. =(302/PJM/PB)
